intake.background: Session 2026-04-27 produced ~38 omega-cycles. One commit was made (2d40c170 covering first 8 cycles, 18 files). ~20+ subsequent cycles' artifacts plus large pre-existing yesterday backlog remain uncommitted. Goal: classify all uncommitted files into proposed commit batches without staging or committing.

F1_git_status_enumeration_complete.evidence: git status --short -uall captured 376 lines (333 entries via short, 376 via -uall; -uall expanded 43 directory listings into individual files). Saved to /tmp/git_status_full.txt and read in full.

F2_each_file_date_classified.evidence: All 376 entries classified into TODAY/YESTERDAY/CROSS-BOUNDARY by combination of (a) ISO-date in filename when present, (b) stat mtime when filename has no date, (c) git diff inspection for modified files. Sample mtime checks confirmed: tool/*.hexa modified files all stat to 2026-04-27; modified n6/atlas.append.*.n6 (yesterday-named) all stat to 2026-04-27 due to 1-line lint-exempt header re-emission today.

F3_each_file_cycle_traced_or_orphan_flag.evidence: design/kick/<DATE>_<topic>_omega_cycle.json filename pattern directly encodes cycle. atlas.append shards have matching topic filename and a 'witness:' line in their header. Modified shards (yesterday-named) had their @origin re-headered today as part of an absorption pass. Orphans flagged: '--help' (stray file at repo root, not a cycle artifact), '.raw-audit' (chflags lock ledger, infrastructure not cycle-bound), 'harness/.git_fresh_state.json' (runtime cache), 'tool/loop_state.jsonl' / 'tool/.cli_budget_state.json' / 'tool/gap_monitor.log' / 'tool/roadmap_sync.jsonl' (runtime tool state, not cycle artifacts).

F4_batch_proposal_evidence_based.evidence: Per-batch line-delta computed via git diff --shortstat -- <pathspec>. Tool .hexa modifications: 24 files / +611 -105. atlas.append shards (modified): 19 files / +19 lines (single-line lint-exempt header insertion each). atlas.n6 body: +4639 lines (auto-ingest accretion across both sessions, cross-boundary). Modified non-shard total (with atlas.n6 excluded): 58 files / +5557 -167.

F5_secret_credentials_detection_honest.evidence: Filename grep for secret|credential|api[_-]?key|password|token|.env|.pem|.key$ across all 376 entries returned ONE hit: 'state/kick/runs/2026-04-26_raw9-triad-activate-secret-blocker/noise_envelopes.jsonl' — this is a kick run directory whose TOPIC NAME contains 'secret-blocker' (a raw-9 incident audit cycle), not a secret payload. Inspected: noise_envelopes.jsonl is a structured log of kick noise envelopes, no credentials. Zero actual secrets/credentials/keys detected.

honesty_flags: atlas.n6 body has +4639 lines accumulating BOTH yesterday and today's auto-ingest output — cannot be cleanly split per-session without re-running ingest from a checkpoint. Recommend committing in whichever session-batch covers the WITNESS FILES that triggered the ingestion, and noting cross-boundary in commit message.

19 modified atlas.append.<yesterday-topic>.n6 shards each gained ONE LINE: '// lint-exempt: ω-cycle witness auto-ingest'. This is a lint-policy retro-touch from today's session, not a content edit. Belongs with TODAY's tooling commit since it's a header-emit policy change.

state/kick/runs/2026-04-26_*/ subdirectories (~24 dirs) are yesterday's session prompts and noise envelopes — they are kick run telemetry, NOT cycle witnesses. User did not commit these yesterday — possibly intentional (treat as runtime state).
state/kick/bench/2026-04-26_*.jsonl (9 files) are yesterday's bench JSONL outputs. Same situation as runs/.

tool/ runtime state files (loop_state.jsonl, .cli_budget_state.json, gap_monitor.log, roadmap_sync.jsonl) churn every cycle — generally should be in .gitignore but currently aren't. Recommend NOT committing.
harness/.git_fresh_state.json is a runtime fetch-cache. Recommend NOT committing.

Repo-root '--help' file (4219 bytes, mtime 2026-04-27 09:12) appears to be stdout of a `--help` invocation accidentally redirected to a file literally named '--help'. Recommend DELETE rather than commit.
'.raw-audit' (chflags lock ledger) is infrastructure state. Likely should be gitignored long-term; for now include with TOOLS commit if user wants ledger preserved.
